decomposition_analysis.prosody_axis_meaning: syntactic-prosodic, NOT emotional — declarative/interrog/excl/whisper are sentence-mode

cover_analysis.valence_axis_coverage: neutral(0) + joy(+) + sadness(-) + anger(-) + fear(-) + surprise(±) — only 3 distinct valence levels
cover_analysis.dominance_axis_coverage: implicit only (anger high, fear low) — not orthogonal
cover_analysis.verdict: PAD coverage gaps in low-arousal quadrants

perceptual_just_noticeable_diff.discrete_step_size_F0: anger F0 ≈ 200Hz, neutral F0 ≈ 120Hz, gap = 67% >> JND 0.6%
perceptual_just_noticeable_diff.implication: discrete 6-way emotion is far above JND — cannot represent intermediate intensities

limits_identified.statement: 1D categorical emotion vs 3D continuous PAD: effective dim mismatch 1 << 3
limits_identified.remediation: add (valence, arousal, dominance) ∈ ℝ³ continuous head alongside categorical

limits_identified.statement: 24 combos cover ≈ 37.5% of 4³=64-cell PAD discretization, missing low-arousal quadrants
67% F0 gap between adjacent emotions >> 0.6% JND; cannot do gradient emotion
Ekman 6 = n6 EXACT match; but Plutchik 8, OCC 22, EmoNet 27 all > n6 — n6 may be lower bound, not optimum
